privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: A&A Driving School ("A&A Driving School", "we", "us") is a Florida driving-course information and lead-generation service. This Privacy Policy explains what information we collect when you contact us and how we use it. It is a practical policy for our current website and may be updated.

sections.heading: Information we collect
body: When you submit a request form, we collect the information you provide: your name, phone number, email address, city, preferred language (English or Spanish), and any message or details you share about your situation.
We also record which course or page your request came from (for example, a recommendation from our Course Finder) so we can follow up with relevant help.
We do not ask for payment information on this website.

sections.heading: How we use your information
body: We use your information to respond to your inquiry, provide information about courses and help options, follow up with you manually, and improve our website.
We do not sell your personal information.

sections.heading: How your request is delivered
body: When you submit a request, it is sent to our team through a configured delivery service (such as an email or webhook provider) so that we can contact you. We share your information with service providers only as needed to receive and respond to your request.

sections.heading: Cookies and analytics
body: Our website does not currently run third-party advertising trackers. If we add analytics in the future, we will update this policy.

sections.heading: Your choices
body: You may ask us to review, update, or delete the information you submitted. To make a request, contact us using the details on our Contact page.

sections.heading: Not affiliated with the DMV
body: A&A Driving School is an independent service. We are not the Florida DMV/FLHSMV, a court, or a testing site.

sections.heading: Changes to this policy
body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Please review it periodically.

sections.heading: Contact us
body: If you have questions about this policy, please reach us through our Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service apply to your use of the A&A Driving School website. By using the site or submitting a request, you agree to these terms. They are a practical set of terms for our current website and may be updated.

sections.heading: About this website
body: A&A Driving School provides information about Florida driving courses and help options and lets you request information or assistance. The website is informational and lead-generation only.

sections.heading: No guarantees
body: We do not guarantee any specific outcome, including license approval, ticket dismissal, point removal, license reinstatement, insurance discounts, or test results. Those outcomes are decided by the state, the courts, your insurer, or an approved provider.

sections.heading: Regulated courses and providers
body: Some courses are regulated in Florida and may be offered through approved providers or partners where required. Availability and eligibility may vary, and pricing for those courses is confirmed during a consultation.

sections.heading: Your responsibilities
body: You are responsible for confirming your eligibility and current requirements with the Florida DMV/FLHSMV, the court or clerk handling your case, your insurer, or an approved provider, as applicable.
You agree to provide accurate information and not to misuse our forms or submit false or automated requests.

sections.heading: Content and changes
body: Website content is provided for general informational purposes and may change at any time without notice.

sections.heading: Payments
body: No payment is collected on this website. Submitting a request form does not create a paid order.

sections.heading: Contact us
body: If you have questions about these terms, please reach us through our Contact page.

refund.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
refund.intro: This policy explains how payments, refunds, and cancellations work for the A&A Driving School website today. It may be updated as our services change.

sections.heading: No payment on this website
body: A&A Driving School does not collect payment on this website. Submitting a request form is a request for information or enrollment help — it is not a purchase and does not create a paid order.

sections.heading: If you pay later
body: If you later choose to pay A&A Driving School or an approved provider for a service or course, the refund and cancellation terms for that specific service or provider will be disclosed to you before you pay.

sections.heading: Regulated courses
body: Regulated courses may be delivered by approved providers. Those providers may have their own refund and cancellation terms, which would apply to their courses.

sections.heading: Questions
body: If you have questions about payments, refunds, or cancellations, please reach us through our Contact page before making any payment.
